Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of The Claim Or Action Of The Minor, Isabella Lindi Victoria Martinez
Off Calendar Mar-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve Compromise of the Claim or Action of the Minor, Isabella Lindi Victoria Martinez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:03 a.m.

Eric G. Benson, Esq. appeared with petitioner Janet Martinez, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Isabella Lindi Victoria Martinez, who was also present.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Benson, Ms. Janet Martinez and Ms. Isebella Lindi Victoria Martinez all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Order appointing Ms. Janet Martinez Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed March 7, 2022.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $5,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,250.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - N/A.
Costs - $0.00.

The net balance of $3,750.00 shall be made payable to Petitioner/Guardian ad Litem, Janet Martinez, in accordance with the provisions set for in Probate Code Sections 3401-3402, without bond.

Proposed Order Approving the Compromise of the Claim or Action of the Minor, Isabella Lindi Victoria Martinez, was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:12 a.m.
